name: MIND TECHNOLOGY, INC
sic_description: Search, Detection, Navigation, Guidance, Aeronautical Sys
summary: MIND Technology, Inc. designs, manufactures, and sells specialized marine seismic and oceanographic equipment through its Seamap Marine Products business. Key products include GunLink seismic source acquisition and control systems, BuoyLink RGNSS positioning systems, Sleeve Gun energy sources, and SeaLink towed seismic streamer systems. The company serves marine survey companies, seismic contractors, research institutes, and governmental organizations globally, with operations in the United States, Singapore, Malaysia, and the United Kingdom.
